introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Bernardino, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As a major Inland Empire city and transportation hub, San Bernardino's busy freeways and logistics center traffic create serious accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our San Bernardino car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on I-10 and I-215, T-bone accidents at major intersections, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents which are a significant problem in San Bernardino, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving warehouse and logistics center traffic from companies like Amazon, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and bicycle accidents.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in San Bernardino
sections.body: San Bernardino's role as a major logistics and distribution center means heavy truck traffic on I-10, I-215, and SR-210. Common causes include truck driver fatigue from warehouse shifts, distracted driving, speeding, drunk driving, aggressive driving, and high hit-and-run rates. The city also sees accidents related to the high volume of commercial traffic near distribution centers. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties and insurance coverage.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in San Bernardino?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene carefully especially if the other driver flees, try to note license plate numbers and vehicle descriptions, exchange information with all involved drivers, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies.

faq.question: How much is my San Bernardino car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Hit-and-run cases require special attention to uninsured motorist coverage. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We have extensive experience with San Bernardino County courts and know how to handle the unique challenges of Inland Empire accident cases, including high rates of uninsured and hit-and-run drivers.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Bernardino, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
